Our Wines/Gota

Gota

One of our cellar's flagship products. Very long oak ageing lends all its complexity to this top-quality spirit.

Grape variety
Merlot and Tempranillo
Colour
Dark amber
Nose
Fruity, aromas reminiscent of whisky
Palate
Very harmonious, smooth with a fruity, bitter finish
Alcohol
48% vol.
Serving temperature
9-13°C
Ageing
Approximately 10 years, 9 years in barrels
Food pairing
After-dinner drink, coffee, cigar
Allergens
contains sulphites

CHF 95.00

Quantity
